name: Super Mario Bros.
description: Super Mario Bros. is a side-scrolling platformer where the player controls either Mario or Luigi (in a two-player mode). The primary objective is to navigate through various levels, defeat enemies, and rescue Princess Peach from Bowser. The game world is divided into worlds and levels, each with a distinct visual theme and increasing difficulty. The player traverses platforms, jumps over gaps, and avoids or defeats enemies. Enemies include Goombas (mushroom-like creatures), Koopa Troopas (turtle-like creatures that can be defeated and then kicked), and various other creatures that present hazards. Certain blocks contain power-ups such as the Super Mushroom (which makes the character larger and able to withstand one hit), the Fire Flower (which allows the character to shoot fireballs), and the Starman (which grants temporary invincibility). Secret areas, like warp zones, can be discovered by finding hidden passages and pipes. The player progresses through the levels, reaching a flagpole at the end of each level to advance. Bowser is the primary antagonist encountered at the end of each world's castle level.

controls.arrow_left: Move the character to the left
controls.arrow_right: Move the character to the right
controls.shift: Run (hold to run) / Throw Fireball (when powered up with Fire Flower)
controls.arrow_down: Duck (when Super Mushroom power-up is active) / Enter a pipe
